name: Caelia
text: Moon! Crescent Gate has countless exits, and you chose the one marked regret.

name: Moon
text: If Selkie is beyond it, that is the path I need.

name: Caelia
text: Need? Stars are suggestions. Even constellations are lines somebody chose to draw.

name: Caelia
text: Then say it: are you reaching for Selkie, or fleeing the sky without her?

name: Moon
text: Open the gate, Caelia. I will answer in motion.
